title: Rebecca Carries the Weight of the Past
description: Pages 1–4 focus on rebecca carries the weight of the past, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as rebecca’s past, the Toy Soldier, and the Riku family tragedy deepen the emotional stakes behind the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s rebellion.

dialogue.text: You'll use the buses meant for carrying 20 of us!!

dialogue.text: This is great! Like a sofa fit for a king.
